title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: Share Data toggle in App Settings > General > Account is ON after accepting PPIP dialog during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing data).
3. On the PPIP (Privacy Policy & Information Prompt) dialog, observe the text: "Help us improve your experience."
4. Tap "Share Data" on the PPIP dialog.
5. Observe that the Home screen is displayed.
6. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle is ON, with a description explaining that basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared, excluding personal information or third-party sharing.
